features: Package Lists: You will receive 50 pieces of Hawaii-themed party goodie bags in red and blue colors, each printed with tropical theme floral and leaf prints. Sufficient quantity to meet your party needs.

Ideal Size: Each cartoon birthday party bag measures about 25x16.5cm/9.84x6.5in, enough space for snacks, cookies, small toys, candies, or party favors. Perfect for classroom treats, birthday goodies, or holiday giveaway items.
Quality Material: Made from premium pearlescent film, these party favor bags are waterproof, tear-resistant, durable, sturdy, and have a slight shimmer. Reusable and long-lasting for reliable use.

Special Design: Our candy bags feature playful tropical prints on both sides, making them eye-catching and perfect for standing out at parties and festive celebrations. The hollow handles make it easy to carry for kids and guests.

Versatile Use: The Hawaii party goodie bags are beautiful and reliable, perfect for birthdays, baby showers, Easter, Christmas, graduations, summer camps, school events, island-themed celebrations, beach or pool events, kids' gift wrapping, or school party giveaways, adding island vibes to your celebration.
